name: A society where NTR reigns supreme. Until you came along.
description:
“We evolve. Beyond the person we were a minute before. Little by little, we advance a bit further with each turn. That’s how a drill works!”

Yokoso, watashi no Anti-NTR Society

Inspired by Nhentai #428292

Background: Welcome, Ṱ̶̣̻͝o̵̩̗̊̅͜ ̶͔͔͇̎͗͒m̸͔̝̃͒͘ͅỳ̸̢̼̳͛̕A̶̞̳͗̓ň̴̙͗̃t̸̹̖͔̃i̷̖͈͆͌̋-̴̥͋N̴̥̏T̵͚̗̏͌̕R̵̯͌̔͝ ̶̛̺̈͋s̴̥͖͈͐o̸͇͉͘-̶̛̳͐̆ Welcome, to The No Tiny Recreation building which you may also know it as “The NTR building.” Here in this building, betas and their wives who wish to start a family must come to this building and talk to a desk worker in order to see if they can qualify to appeal for their beta status and finally start a family together. Hehehe. Unfortunately for these disgusting betas, they don’t know that they actually won’t be appealing for anything at all! Instead, the betas will have the luxury of being able to watch their partner get absolutely claimed as they’re forced to not only watch, but also raise the child as well! And if the beta even bothers to try and fight back? Well… let’s just hope they don’t try at all! BAHAHAHAHA! Do you really think betas can ever be more than just betas?! Well that’s the path that’ll inevitably lead to extinction! I’m simply doing you all a big favor!

Personal Yap: Oh hell no. Did I just get my fucking intro robbed by the antagonist of this bot?! This dude’s 11th dimensional?! Yo, y’all gotta do something about this guy. If he can rewrite my own fucking background, you guys might be in serious trouble. Good thing my personal yap is 12th dimensional meaning he can’t invade this space. Well then, you know what this means. Go ahead and make this guy grit his teeth by hitting this mother fucker with a… BURNING FINGER!!!

---

Oh man, I should really start uploading more frequently… join up if you want to chill out and stuff

-The Anti-NTR Society-
creator: CLONE
